case_title: VICTORIA O. OFAMAN VS. CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A. AND SEARS ROEBUCK & COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION COMPELLED AND THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING ITS COMPLETION. EVEN ASSUMING THE AGREEMENT IS PROCEDURALLY UNCONSCIONABLE, PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN NO SUBSTANTIVE UNCONSCIONABILITY. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR # 12353 301/PJB

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A. AND SEARS ROEBUCK & COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Arbitration IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION COMPELLED AND THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING ITS COMPLETION. EVEN ASSUMING THE AGREEMENT IS PROCEDURALLY UNCONSCIONABLE, PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN NO SUBSTANTIVE UNCONSCIONABILITY. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR # 12353 =301/PJB
